page_content:
Prerequisite: KNES600, KNES601, and KNES602.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 783

KNES604 Development of Posture and Locomotion (3 Credits) Development of posture and locomotion in humans integrating the perspectives of biomechanics, neurophysiology, perception-action theory and dynamical systems.
